subject: How much do you spend reprinting menus each year?
body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Change a price or add a dish and suddenly you're reprinting, or your QR code is out of date until someone complains.

GetSolvedIt fixes it: upload your new menu PDF and your QR instantly shows the updated version. Two minutes, no designers, no printing.

https://www.getsolvedit.com/menu?mkt=uk&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v1-founder
alternatives.subject: The QR that's still showing last season's menu
alternatives.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

I'm building a tool for restaurants that solves one specific problem: update your menu PDF whenever you want and your QR code always points to the latest version. No reprinting, no redesign, no broken links.

Would that be useful to you?

https://www.getsolvedit.com/menu?mkt=uk&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v2-soft-launch
alternatives.subject: Update your menu anytime — your QR never changes
alternatives.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We built a simple tool for restaurants: upload your updated menu PDF and your QR code instantly shows the new version. No reprinting, no redesign costs, no broken links.

If you'd like early access:

https://www.getsolvedit.com/menu?mkt=uk&lang=en&s=em
